LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JANAS PAGE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO DR. GORTON. THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT NOT AS PROPOSED, BUT IN ACCORDANCE TO WHAT WAS STATED AT THIS HEARING. MR. WARREN IS TO OBTAIN TRANSCRIPTS, PREPARE AN ORDER THAT INCLUDES THERE IS NO LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST LYON-MARTIN AND NO LEAVE TO ADD NEW DEFENDANTS UNDER 474 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURES AND PROVIDE THE PROPOSED ORDER TO MS. RHOADS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
